title: Amtech Hot Glue Gun for Home DIY and Crafting - Easy to Use with Precision Trigger Control, Quickly Heats up to 90C, Heavy Duty, Lightweight, 90cm Cord, Includes 2 x 11mm Glue Sticks (50W)
features: EASY TO USE: This lightweight 50W hot glue gun has a pistol grip for easy handling and has a long, 90cm cord
2 GLUE STICKS INCLUDED: Supplied with two 11mm glue sticks, it has a melting temperature of approximately 90°C
APPLICATIONS: It is ideal for arts and crafts activities as well as general household repairs
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Easy to use with pistol grip, precise trigger control, and a 90cm cord for long reach. Ideal for a variety of household DIY tasks, and arts and crafts Includes 2 x 11mm glue sticks and a stand to safely rest when not using. Has a melting temperature of 90𐩑C.
